feedback.title: A moment of reflection
feedback.desc: How do you evaluate today's session? Your feedback helps us adapt the app to you.

nasa.mentalDesc: How much mental and perceptual activity was required?
nasa.physicalDesc: How much physical activity was required?
nasa.temporalDesc: How hurried or rushed was the pace of the task?
nasa.performanceDesc: How successful were you in accomplishing what you were asked to do?
nasa.effortDesc: How hard did you have to work to accomplish your level of performance?
nasa.frustrationDesc: How insecure, discouraged, irritated, stressed, and annoyed were you?

sus.q01: I think that I would like to use this system frequently.
sus.q02: I found the system unnecessarily complex.
sus.q03: I thought the system was easy to use.
sus.q04: I think that I would need the support of a technical person to be able to use this system.
sus.q05: I found the various functions in this system were well integrated.
sus.q06: I thought there was too much inconsistency in this system.
sus.q07: I would imagine that most people would learn to use this system very quickly.
sus.q08: I found the system very cumbersome to use.
sus.q09: I felt very confident using the system.
sus.q10: I needed to learn a lot of things before I could get going with this system.
